items.description: No 0.0.0.0/0 ingress rules in any firewall or security group
All managed services accessed via VPC endpoints or private connectivity
No world-readable storage buckets or containers
All secrets stored in secret manager — not in env files, CI logs, or container images
IAM roles follow least privilege — no wildcard permissions or admin roles
Network segmentation reviewed — web, app, and data tiers isolated
WAF rules updated if new public endpoints added
Cloud audit logging confirmed for all new resources
IaC scan passed (Checkov/tfsec/Terrascan) with no HIGH/CRITICAL findings
Container scan passed — no CRITICAL CVEs with available fix
Terraform state stored with encryption and locking — restricted access
Provider and module versions pinned to exact versions — no floating ranges
Drift detection enabled — unauthorized changes trigger alerts
Backups configured and restore tested for all data stores
TLS 1.3 configured — TLS 1.0/1.1 disabled on all endpoints
Encryption at rest with CMEK/KMS for all data stores
MFA enforced for all console and cloud provider access
SBOM generated for all container images included in this change
SLSA provenance attestation generated for release artifacts
Threat model completed and reviewed for this infrastructure change
Zero Trust controls applied — explicit authentication for all service-to-service calls
DDoS protection enabled for public-facing load balancers
